sourcesContent: import { Box, Grid } from "@mui/material" import styles from 'utilities/global_styles.module.css' const RewardsSection = () => { return Civitas is Fun Get a chance to earn rewards! While providing these opportunities, Civitas Europe offers even more. By collecting our special coins, you can earn rewards, special discounts, and additional perks. Our mission started with the goal of supporting the students, and we are committed to provide tangible benefits to enhance your experience. Your journey is our priority and we are here to support you every step of the way. Civitas is Fun Get a chance to earn rewards! While providing these opportunities, Civitas Europe offers even more.
